# The Magic Lab

> A free, open-source workspace for magicians to organize their repertoire,
> plan routines, track practice sessions, and refine performances.

## Docs

- [Home](https://themagiclab.app): Overview and features
- [Privacy](https://themagiclab.app/privacy): Privacy policy
- [FAQ](https://themagiclab.app/faq): Common questions

## Optional

- [Full docs](https://themagiclab.app/llms-full.txt): Complete documentation
